function F(F)return X[F-(-400789+411601)]end for F,L in ipairs({{551175+-551174,-309744-(-311519)};{-113964-(-113965);686622-686335},{-380178-(-380466);192704+-190929}})do while do local F=string.sub local L=string.len local l=X local D=string.char local e=table.concat local x=math.floor local N=type local U=table.insert local
